mustPass: The scaffold must reflect manufacturing and B2B information needs rather than a generic local service layout.
Home, products, production, sustainability and contact together must give a credible overview of offer, capability and how to initiate dialogue.
All environmental or quality-related wording must remain cautious and factual unless the dossier explicitly supports stronger claims.
The contact route must support direct inquiry with clear business contact details and optional form.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Do not model the business like a restaurant, portfolio site or appointment-led consumer service.
Do not invent certifications, export claims, capacity figures, customer counts or sustainability achievements.
Do not rely on generic 'services' wording when the industry's core need is product and manufacturing presentation.
Do not create a webshop or shopping-cart structure unless the dossier explicitly indicates online retail.
